title: Undertrial
subTitle: A factory worker faces a nightmare when he is wrongly framed for a heinous crime and comes across shocking revelations that are hidden in the dark.

title: Love Alive
subTitle: Bhaarat reminisces a dream about a happy and fulfilling life, only to wake up lonely the next day. However, he finds love and strives to take his relationship forward.

title: Unakkaga Ellam Unakkaga
subTitle: Sakthivel, an irresponsible man, disapproves of the marriage arranged for him by his father and tries to ruin it. However, he is surprised to learn that the prospective bride is the woman he loves.

title: Undertrial
subTitle: A factory worker faces a nightmare when he is wrongly framed for a heinous crime and comes across shocking revelations that are hidden in the dark.

title: Karobaar: The Business of Love
subTitle: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

title: Baghban
subTitle: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

title: Freaky Ali
subTitle: Ali, an extortionist debt collector, decides to leave his murky past behind to pursue a new career in golf, a sport for which he has a natural talent.

title: Gulzar Dil
subTitle: Cheenu pretends to fall in love with Maya as part of a challenge. However, he eventually falls for her for real, and they must overcome family obstacles to be together.

title: Baazi
subTitle: An honest officer is framed for murder when he starts investigating a case. However, he manages to escape from prison and goes undercover as a woman to unravel the conspiracy.

title: Ragini MMS 2
subTitle: A director's decision to film an erotic horror movie in a haunted house brings trouble when a spirit possesses the body of the lead actress.

title: Tapish
subTitle: After her husband dies on the night of their wedding, Lajwanti is forced to live out her life as a widow. But even when she starts to take an interest in someone else, her past becomes an obstacle.

title: Gulzar Dil
subTitle: Cheenu pretends to fall in love with Maya as part of a challenge. However, he eventually falls for her for real, and they must overcome family obstacles to be together.

title: Jai Balaji Mehndipur Wale
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Kisaan
subTitle: A resilient farmer sends one son to study law while the other helps with the farm. When a businessman attempts to seize their land the brothers unite against him.

title: Pahredaar
subTitle: Raghu and Malavika grow close during a scenic road trip to Christchurch. Despite their bond, they part ways without confessing their feelings, leaving their future uncertain.

title: All the Best: Fun Begins
subTitle: When a wealthy sibling pays a surprise visit, two best friends struggle to keep up with the web of lies they fooled him with, in order to ensure a generous allowance.

title: Maqbool
subTitle: Maqbool, an underworld don's henchman, falls in love with his boss's mistress, Nimmi, who instigates him to kill the don and become the next leader.

title: Kuku Mathur Ki Jhand Ho Gayi
subTitle: Best friends Kuku and Ronnie spend most of their time together. However, when Ronnie gets busy running his family's business, Kuku tries to get him back through improper ways.

title: Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyar
subTitle: A wealthy woman falls for a man of lower social status and decides to elope with him, unaware of the challenges ahead in life.

title: Filhaal
subTitle: When Sia watches her best friend Rewa slip into depression because of her inability to bear a child, she offers to be her surrogate. Trouble brews when jealousy finds its way into their relationship.

title: Unnaruge Naan Irundhal
subTitle: A taxi driver's life changes after he meets Mahalakshmi, a girl who is financially indebted to many. While they grow closer to each other, his encounter with his favourite actor threatens their love.

title: Badal
subTitle: Badal's family dies at the hands of a corrupt police officer. While he is raised by his father's friend, he turns into a terrorist and vows to avenge his family's death.

title: Ek Thi Daayan
subTitle: A famous magician plans to marry his girlfriend. However, he is secretly scarred by persistent hallucinations of his dead sister and is forced to seek psychiatric help.

title: Dear Maya
subTitle: Anna and Ira, two young women, begin a prank by sending letters to a local woman under the guise of a secret admirer. However, things take a turn for the worse when she goes missing.
